sglang.title: [Bug Fix] Fix Glm4vVisionBlock norm
sglang.author: sdpkjc
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR fixes a runtime crash in Glm4vVisionBlock when running vision prefill. After #9709, Qwen2_5_VisionBlock calls norm2(x2d, residual=attn2d) and expects a residual-aware interface that returns (norm2d, after_add2d). Glm4vVisionBlock was still overriding norm1/norm2 with Glm4vRMSNorm

sglang.title: [NVIDIA] disable chunked prefix cache when dp is used
sglang.author: kaixih
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is to work around an accuracy issue found in #9806.
It seems the chunked prefix cache doesn't work well with the DP. So, we disable it for now to recover the accuracy.
cc @trevor-m @kushanam @zhyncs

vllm.title: [RFC] allow cancelation after shutdown in blocking collective_rpc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
When a worker proc dead, monitor thread in engine core process will trigger shutdown which will shutdown all the work processes and push a EXECUTOR_FAILED request to the input req queue.
However, the engine core main thread might be blocking wait on collective_rpc() and default timeout is 5

vllm.title: [KV Sharing] Raise error if using eagle with fast prefill
vllm.author: shinoss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Raise error if EAGLE spec decoding used with fast prefill. EAGLE expects logits for all tokens to be correct after prefill, this is violated by fast prefill.
Also consolidate warnings about fast prefill in one place.
Test Plan
vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --speculative-config=

vllm.title: [Feature] Support Decode Context Parallel (DCP) for MLA
vllm.author: youzhedian
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds Decode Context Parallel (DCP) support for MLA inference, fully compatible with chunked prefill and APC.
You can enable DCP with --decode-context-parallel-size/-dcp xxx (only support flashmla backend now), and tp_size needs to be divisible by dcp_size, because the world size does not cha

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Catch and log invalid token ids in detokenizer
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
There is a token overflow issue with quantized models that happens occasionally: #21951
The exact cause is not yet clear and it appears to be difficult to reproduce.
This change just insulates against the error, skipping the problem token but still logging the exception. It also prints the token id

vllm.title: [Core] Allow disabling TP sharding for parallel Linear layer
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Refer to ##22743, we need to disable TP at ViT if enable DP for it.
Currently, to achieve this, we need to replaced all parallel linear layers to replicated linear, which will make model implementation too complicated if it needs weights packing logic. Furthermore, to fuse qkv_proj and gate
